name: Martha's Company Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, cook meat, onion, and green pepper until the meat is brown and vegetables are tender.
2. Drain off any excess liquid. Stir in tomato sauce and season with salt and pepper to taste.
3. Cook noodles separately.
4. In a small bowl, combine cheeses and yogurt.
5. Toss the cheese and yogurt mixture with hot, cooked noodles.
6. Layer half of the noodle mixture into a 9x13-inch casserole dish.
7. Spoon the meat over the center of the layer.
8. Layer remaining noodles over the meat.
9. Cover and bake at 375°F for 30 minutes.
10. Uncover and bake another 10-15 minutes, or until bubbly.
